title: Betterite
description: Adds a new ore, Betterite. Cook the raw Betterite into Betterite ingots, then use a smithing table to apply it to Netherite tools.
body:
# Betterite

This is an old mod from around 2021 that I made originally with MCreator, now being remade and rewritten in Forge by
hand. It was originally in 1.19.2, but I decided to remake it in 1.20.1 since more people use that one as far as I'm
aware. Including me!

You can find the original versions either [on the versions page](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterite/versions) or:

* [1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterite/version/1.0.0)
* [1.0.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterite/version/1.0.1)
* [1.0.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterite/version/1.0.2)
* [1.1.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterite/version/1.1.0)

I haven't hand-made a mod in Forge before, so this will take a while.
